style: 1997 PlayStation-era low-poly 3D rendered character portrait, triangulated low-polygon head, flat-shaded polygons, affine texture warping, dithered 15-bit color, jagged silhouette edges, retro console render, transparent background, head and shoulders bust, facing viewer, unbroken eye contact with camera, original character

slots.char_og: unremarkable everyman in a plain gray-blue tee, short brown hair, light stubble, faint smug half-smile, dead calm stare
slots.char_mentality: pale man in a black baseball cap and plain white shirt, wide unblinking eyes, jaw set, aura of pure focus
slots.char_blockhead: man with a perfectly cubic olive-green head like a blocky crafting-game character, flat square pixel features, mossy flat-top hair, stoic blank expression (original design, instantly readable as a blocky-game nod)
slots.char_easyface: cheerful perfectly-round yellow face like a difficulty-rating icon, big friendly oval eyes, small confident smile, blue collared shirt (original design, reads as a difficulty-face nod)
slots.char_merc: burly team-shooter mercenary in a dark balaclava and rust-red team jacket, only intense eyes visible, gruff military bearing (original design, reads as a class-shooter nod)
slots.char_metro: tired commuter in a gray hoodie and dark beanie, heavy eyelids, thousand-yard stare, faint metro-map reflection in eyes
slots.char_cowboy: steel-gray weathered cowboy, wide purple-banded hat, red bandana over nose, narrowed eyes
slots.char_demon: dark crimson demon head with short black horns, glowing red pupils, gritted jaw, black muscle-shirt
slots.char_sigma: slick businessman in a black suit and narrow black sunglasses, jet-black slicked hair, zero expression
slots.char_discipline: radiant pure-white figure, softly glowing skin, thin golden halo, serene closed-mouth expression, white robe collar
slots.char_gymbro: swole gym enthusiast, red stringer tank, spiky black hair, stubble, veiny neck, competitive glare
slots.char_npc: eerily generic gray-toned man, symmetrical bland face, flat gray hair, polite empty smile
slots.char_doomer: gaunt young man in a black beanie and dark jacket, stubble, sunken tired eyes, resigned frown
slots.char_bloomer: bright-eyed optimist with golden hair, light tan, soft green shirt, warm genuine smile
slots.char_yapper: animated talker mid-sentence, long brown hair, pink shirt, mouth open, eyebrows raised
slots.char_cryptouncle: middle-aged hustler in gold-tinted aviators, gray mustache, mustard blazer, desperate grin
slots.char_aurafarmer: purple-lit teen with violet spiky hair, faint glowing outline, self-satisfied smirk
slots.char_granny: sweet elderly lady with a white afro perm, lavender cardigan, kind smile, unsettlingly steady stare
slots.char_mime: classic mime, white face paint, black beanie, striped shirt, one eyebrow raised, silent menace
slots.char_kingpin: construction boss in an orange hard hat and vest, full dark beard, satisfied grin
slots.char_valet: sharp valet in a black uniform and gold-trimmed cap, thin mustache, professional smile
slots.char_chef: portly chef in a tall white toque, big mustache, flushed cheeks, intense culinary stare
slots.char_detective: noir detective in a worn brown fedora and trench coat, stubble, one eyebrow cocked
slots.char_surgeon: calm surgeon in teal scrubs, surgical mask and cap, precise unblinking eyes
slots.char_lifeguard: tanned lifeguard, long sun-bleached hair, red tank, whistle on lanyard, mirrored sunglasses
slots.char_astronaut: astronaut in a white-gray helmet, gold reflective visor showing a faint traffic light reflection
slots.char_conductor: elderly orchestra conductor, wild white spiky hair, black formal coat, raised chin, fierce artistic gaze
slots.char_beekeeper: beekeeper in a cream mesh-veiled hat, yellow jacket, calm smile, one bee on shoulder
slots.char_librarian: stern librarian, brown bun hair, thin dark glasses, cardigan, lips pressed in a shush
slots.char_mailman: determined mail carrier in a blue cap and uniform, square jaw, resolute stare
slots.char_knight: medieval knight in a steel helm with raised visor, determined eyes, chainmail collar
slots.char_pharaoh: regal pharaoh with a gold-and-teal striped headdress, kohl-lined eyes, imperious calm
slots.char_viking: wild viking with a horned steel helmet, huge braided red-brown beard, battle grin

slots.char_pirate: grizzled pirate in a black tricorn hat, eyepatch, dark beard, gold tooth grin
slots.char_wizard: ancient wizard in a deep purple pointed hat, long white beard, twinkling knowing eyes

slots.char_vampire: pale aristocratic vampire, slicked black widow's peak, high dark collar, faint fang smile

slots.char_gen_*: 40 varied original commuter busts in the same style: mixed ages, skin tones, hairstyles (mohawk, afro, spiky, long, bald), hats (cap, beanie, cowboy, helmet), facial hair, headphones, eyepatches - every one staring dead at the camera
